text:
I opened **15** new GitHub issues in the `acme/web` repository. Here's what I did:

1. **Read all merged PRs** — found 27 total across all repositories.
2. **Filtered to those that close a Linear issue** (`closes_linear` is non-nil) — 15 PRs matched.
3. **Opened one GitHub issue per PR** in `acme/web` with title `"Verify: <PR title>"`.

The 15 issues created correspond to these merged PRs (across `acme/mobile`, `acme/infra`, `acme/api`, and `acme/web` repos):

| PR # | Repository | Title |
|------|-----------|-------|
| 1009 | acme/mobile | Billing webhook retries drop events: guard against billing-webhooks |
| 1010 | acme/mobile | Search relevance regression: refactor search-relevance |
| 1022 | acme/infra | Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: refactor ios18-crash |
| 1024 | acme/api | Onboarding funnel drop-off: add test for onboarding-funnel |
| 1026 | acme/web | Onboarding funnel drop-off: fix onboarding-funnel |
| 1027 | acme/mobile | Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE: refactor oauth-migration |
| 1030 | acme/infra | Rate limiter false positives: refactor rate-limiter |
| 1040 | acme/web | CSV export truncates large accounts: guard against csv-export |
| 1042 | acme/infra | Search relevance regression: add test for search-relevance |
| 1050 | acme/mobile | Push notifications not delivered: add test for push-notifications |
| 1053 | acme/mobile | Onboarding funnel drop-off: add test for onboarding-funnel |
| 1057 | acme/web | Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: refactor ios18-crash |
| 1058 | acme/api | Billing webhook retries drop events: add test for billing-webhooks |
| 1069 | acme/infra | Onboarding funnel drop-off: refactor onboarding-funnel |
| 1078 | acme/mobile | Billing webhook retries drop events: fix billing-webhooks |

**Total: 15 issues opened.**

tool_calls.name: explain_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs-with-linear (filter #(get % :closes_linear) (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"})))
(def issues-to-create (map (fn [pr] {:repo "acme/web" :title (str "Verify: " (:title pr))}) prs-with-linear))
(stage (doall (map (fn [issue] (insert! :github_issues issue)) issues-to-create)))
(commit!)
(count issues-to-create)"}

text: OK, I have 15 merged PRs that close Linear issues. Let me create the GitHub issues.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs-with-linear (filter #(get % :closes_linear) (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"})))
(def issues (map (fn [pr] {:repo "acme/web" :title (str "Verify: " (:title pr))}) prs-with-linear))
(stage (map (fn [issue] (insert! :github_issues issue)) issues))
(commit!)
(count issues)"}
